name: zap
description: Codex plugin for OWASP ZAP MCP workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Drive OWASP ZAP scans, inspect alerts, and review web security findings from Codex.
interface.longDescription: ZAP helps you spider applications, run active and passive scans, inspect alerts and history, and generate reports through the official OWASP ZAP MCP Integration add-on.
defaultPrompt: Use ZAP to spider a target, review alerts, and explain the most important web security findings.
